codeReview.summary: The original chronology fix is now acceptable in combination with the follow-up commit 618a51d. `packages/webapp/src/scoops/agent-bridge.ts:655` still implements the reverse chronological picker introduced by 37564cf, and the follow-up now joins consecutive non-whitespace text blocks within the winning assistant message until the nearest preceding `toolCall` checkpoint (`packages/webapp/src/scoops/agent-bridge.ts:632-682`), which directly fixes the truncation called out in the prior review. Coverage now spans both the original VAL-OUTPUT-016 ordering contract (`packages/webapp/tests/scoops/agent-bridge.test.ts:485-637`) and the multi-text-block regression/boundary cases (`packages/webapp/tests/scoops/agent-bridge.test.ts:652-789`), with the `agent` command stdout contract still covered at `packages/webapp/tests/shell/supplemental-commands/agent-command.test.ts:619-632`. The prompt guidance remains aligned with the runtime semantics at `packages/webapp/src/scoops/scoop-context.ts:851-858`. No blocking issue remains.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `webapp-worker` skill still does not explicitly tell workers what to do when manual `agent` verification is provider-gated and no provider is configured, even though the shared testing library already documents that case. This gap remains visible in the superseded original feature workflow.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/webapp-worker/SKILL.md:85-96,116` makes per-feature manual CDP verification the source of truth but only hints at a configured provider via the example command, while `.factory/library/user-testing.md:44,74` explicitly says provider-less runs should be recorded as a provider-gated/distinct failure mode. The original feature handoff at `/Users/trieloff/.factory/missions/094c0314-6896-4f76-bf58-89b7dfee66f4/handoffs/2026-04-17T22-34-19-509Z__fix-agent-output-chronological-last-message__43803c84-de75-4353-b6f3-89e801eadc97.json` shows the worker had to improvise an eval-based substitute after finding no provider keys configured.

summary: Pass. The only blocker from the prior review was multi-text-block assistant-text truncation, and commit 618a51d fixes it while preserving the original last-output-wins chronology behavior.
